title: ochlandra setigera
intro: Ochlandra setigera, also known as the black stem, is a plant species belonging to the family Poaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its root and rhizomes, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ochlandra setigera include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Ochlandra setigera include decoctions and infusions of its root and rhizomes, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
